title: GREECE enforcement action against REVMA PLUS Retail S.A. (5,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Greek DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 5,000 on REVMA PLUS Retail S.A.. The fined entity is the processor of Thessaloniki–Thessaly Gas Supply Company S.A. (ETid-3016). The processor, a call center involved in direct marketing activities, suffered a technica...
